# Refine Aesthetics & Skin Clinic

> Advanced aesthetics, semi-permanent cosmetics and medical-grade skincare clinic in West Kirby, Wirral. Operated by Samantha Casey, BSc (Hons) Chemistry, Advanced Aesthetics Practitioner and SPMU Educator. Located at 56 Grange Road, West Kirby, Wirral, CH48 4EG (inside LUXE Supersalon).

## Services

- [Anti-Wrinkle Injections](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/anti-wrinkle.html): Botulinum toxin treatments — pricing available on consultation. Results last 3–4 months.
- [Dermal Filler](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/dermal-filler.html): Hyaluronic acid filler for cheeks, jawline, chin and tear troughs.
- [Lip Filler](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/lip-filler-west-kirby.html): Natural lip enhancement — pricing available on consultation.
- [Profhilo Skin Booster](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/profhilo-west-kirby.html): Bio-remodelling injectable — pricing available on consultation; two sessions four weeks apart recommended.
- [Microneedling](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/microneedling-wirral.html): EXCEED Precision microneedling — pricing available on consultation.
- [Skin Treatments](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/skin-treatments.html): Profhilo, microneedling, BioRePeel peels, Dermalux LED and advanced facials — pricing available on consultation.
- [Aesthetics Clinic Overview](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/aesthetics-west-kirby.html): Full treatment menu and clinic information.
- [Full Price List](https://refineaestheticswirral.co.uk/prices.html): Complete pricing across all treatments.

## Clinic Details

- Address: 56 Grange Road, West Kirby, Wirral, CH48 4EG (inside LUXE Supersalon)
- Phone / WhatsApp: 07912 683492
- Email: info@refineaestheticswirral.com
- Hours: Mon, Wed, Fri 09:00–18:00; Sat 09:00–14:00
- Area served: West Kirby, Hoylake, Heswall, Neston and the wider Wirral Peninsula

## Practitioner

Samantha Casey — BSc (Hons) Chemistry, Advanced Aesthetics Practitioner, SPMU Educator. All injectables and skin treatments are performed personally.
